description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of heeled sandals from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair works great both as an office wear and for parties. This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease. Heel: 1.5" Upper Ergonomically curved and padded synthetic leather footbed for absolute comfort and style Leather back heel strap with a sheen upper, cross midfoot sheen lined strap and a big toe holder with a bead embellishment to hold the foot in place in style Elasticated fore ankle band to offer a customised Fit Outsole TPU outsole with textured lugs for absolute grip even on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
